description: Configure Screaming Frog SEO Spider to audit https://books.toscrape.com/ for content compliance using Custom Search. Configure three Page Source search rules: 'Buy Button' (contains text 'Add to basket'), 'Availability' (contains text 'In stock'), and 'Price Format' (contains regex '£[0-9]+\.[0-9]{2}'). Crawl the site and export the Custom Search results to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/custom_search_results.csv'. Additionally, write a summary report at '~/Documents/SEO/reports/content_quality_report.txt' that includes the total page count, counts for each search pattern found, and recommendations.
